checklist_notes.source_support_checked: Corpus verified STRONG — 5-3_6_vineyard_management.md (Machine Harvesters) states that night harvesting slows oxidation, directly confirming oxidation as the risk of mechanical harvesting. Per TIER1_CORPUS_VERIFICATION_REPORT.md, grounding is inferential but explicit.
checklist_notes.correct_answer_checked: Option B 'Puede aumentar la oxidación' is directly supported: corpus names oxidation as the process that night harvesting mitigates.
checklist_notes.distractor_logic_checked: Option A (improves primary aromas — reversal), C (carbonic maceration — requires intact grapes, opposite of machine harvesting), D (reduces alcohol — no mechanism). All clearly incorrect.
